products.name: Discovery
description: Our flagship two tonearm platform featuring a radically new exo-skeleton chassis system designed to minimize resonances and optimize isolation.
Kronos developed a wholly new way to attach the chassis to the suspension system, using completely different soft clamping methods.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Discovery represents Kronos Audio's most ambitious expression of counter-rotational analogue playback. Its exo-skeleton chassis and isolated suspension architecture are tuned to lower stored energy, improve timing precision, and preserve low-level musical detail.

Designed as a reference platform for discerning listeners, Discovery supports a dual-tonearm layout and a highly resolved mechanical grounding strategy. Every interface is intended to keep resonant behavior predictable while maintaining the sense of ease and scale associated with the brand's flagship systems.
notes: Reference-level chassis architecture with dual-tonearm capability.
Optimized for isolation, stability, and long-term upgradeability.

products.name: Perpetual
description: Our one tonearm turntable, utilizing advanced resonance control at a more affordable price point.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Perpetual brings Kronos’ counter-rotational design philosophy into a refined single-tonearm platform, created for listeners who want the essence of Kronos performance in a more accessible configuration.
Our one-tonearm turntable, utilizing Discovery-type advanced resonance control at a more affordable price point.

Its architecture focuses on resonance control, drive stability, and a direct mechanical path between the record groove and the listener. By adapting key ideas from Discovery, Perpetual preserves timing accuracy, low-level detail, and the natural musical flow associated with Kronos turntables.
notes: A single-tonearm Kronos platform inspired by Discovery’s advanced resonance-control architecture.
Designed to deliver high precision, stability, and musical refinement in a more approachable form.

endorsements.title: Kronos Perpetual Turntable
endorsements.quote: A new benchmark in performance and value.

endorsements.title: Kronos Perpetual - Discovery Reference
endorsements.quote: Editorial coverage of the Kronos Perpetual installed with the Discovery Reference phono preamplifier.

endorsements.title: AXPONA 2026
endorsements.quote: Show coverage featuring the Kronos Perpetual dual-platter counter-rotating turntable with super-capacitor power supply.

endorsements.title: E211: The KRONOS Perpetual Experience
endorsements.quote: An experience-focused editorial entry centered on an extended listen to the production release of the KRONOS Perpetual Turntable.

products.name: Kronos Pro
description: The original Kronos reference turntable. The PRO set a new standard in analogue reproduction by combining counter-rotation and overhead suspension.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kronos Pro is the foundational reference platform that defined the brand’s approach to counter-rotational analogue playback. Introduced in 2011 as a breakthrough design, it established new standards in speed stability, resonance control, and mechanical balance.

Built as a strictly limited production of 250 units, Kronos Pro remains a highly sought-after reference. Select demonstration and factory-approved pre-owned examples continue to be available through authorized distributors.
notes: The original Kronos reference platform that introduced counter-rotational design.
Limited to 250 units worldwide, with select pre-owned models available through distributors.

products.name: Sparta
products.tagline: The Soul of a New Machine
description: Our no-frills platform - an entry to the world of KRONOS.
Unique to behold, the Sparta is essentially two complete turntables-each including a skeletal, metal-framed plinth fabricated of solid aluminum boards.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Sparta turntable is the embodiment of Kronos Audio's core design principles, distilled into their purest form. Built to disappear into silence-so the recording remains. Every surface, every interface, every tolerance exists for one purpose: to preserve time.

At the heart of the Sparta are two counter-rotating platters, each driven by its own motor and suspended from above by a network of elastomers that isolate the mechanism from external vibrations. The result is a level of speed stability and resonance control that belies the Sparta's modest price point.
notes: Built to disappear into silence-so the recording remains.
Every surface, every interface, every tolerance exists for one purpose: to preserve time.

endorsements.quote: I've never before been treated to vinyl playback from any system I've owned that is as clearly and profoundly moving as what I am now hearing...
I've never before been treated to vinyl playback from any system I've owned that is as clearly and profoundly moving as what I am now hearing...
A cloudless day has dawned over the vinyl landscape, one where you feel you can see forever and your view is only limited by your acuity. There are no environmental impediments in the way.
The Kronos Sparta turntable takes the counter rotational technology of the flagship Kronos turntable and incorporates it into a more affordable and tidy package.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kronos tonearms are designed as a direct extension of the brand’s analogue playback philosophy, focused on precision, stability, and signal integrity.

The Discovery RS and Kronoscope RS tonearms utilize Kronos’ patented Resonance Suppression Technology to control vibrational energy at the source, maximizing the signal-to-noise ratio of analogue extraction and preserving musical detail with clarity and balance.
notes: RS tonearms developed for Discovery and Kronoscope platforms.
Incorporating patented Resonance Suppression Technology to maximize analogue signal integrity.

endorsements.title: Kronoscope RS Tonearm
endorsements.quote: The Kronoscope RS tonearm joins the rest of the Kronos stable as a reference caliber product.

endorsements.title: KRONOS Discovery Resonance Suppression Tonearm
endorsements.quote: This new KRONOS Discovery RS tonearm presents a more uncolored, articulate, concise view into my recordings than any other tonearm in my experience, at any price!

endorsements.title: Kronos Discovery RS Tonearm Review
endorsements.quote: Discovery RS takes its engaging character a step further, never letting the music fall apart or feel spastic, and ready at any time to assist and contribute as an elemental link of ultimate analog playback.

endorsements.title: Kronos PRO Turntable - Kronoscope RS Tonearm Review
endorsements.quote: Both the Kronos PRO turntable and the Kronos RS Kronoscope RS tonearm pack a hell of a lot of power and are easy to use.

endorsements.title: Kronos Sparta Turntable and Helena Tonearm
endorsements.quote: A formal evaluation of the Helena tonearm as part of a complete Kronos analog front-end.

products.name: Phono Preamplifiers
description: Reference phono stages designed to preserve the integrity of the analog signal.
Engineered for low noise, accurate gain, and tonal neutrality.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kronos phono stages are designed to preserve the integrity of analogue playback, translating delicate cartridge signals with precision, stability, and tonal coherence.
The Discovery Phono stage is a full-tube, three-chassis design with GZ32 rectification, 12AX7 / 6350 tubes, dual inputs, and a 5-step adjustable EQ, offering both single-ended and balanced outputs.
The Reference Phono stage provides a more compact full-tube, two-chassis configuration with dual inputs, a 3-step adjustable EQ, and single-ended output.
notes: Full-tube phono stages designed for precision analogue signal extraction.
Available in reference three-chassis and compact two-chassis configurations.

endorsements.title: Kronos Discovery Phono
endorsements.quote: Launch coverage introducing the new Kronos Discovery Phono ahead of High End Munich 2024.

endorsements.title: Kronos Discovery Phono Preamplifier
endorsements.quote: Editorial coverage of the Kronos Audio Discovery flagship reference tube phono preamplifier featuring a proprietary patented suspension system.

endorsements.title: High End Munich 2024 Postscript, Part 1

endorsements.title: High End Munich 2024 coverage
endorsements.quote: Show coverage documenting the Kronos Discovery phono stage in a flagship analog playback system.

products.name: Full Analogue Solution
description: Engineered foundations that control vibration and preserve mechanical integrity, allowing Kronos systems to perform at their highest level.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The racks and support solutions complete the Kronos playback environment by addressing the physical foundation beneath the system. Their role is to reduce environmental interference and give the analogue chain a more stable platform from floor to chassis.

Designed as part of a complete analogue solution, these support systems provide a controlled mechanical interface for turntables, electronics, and power supplies, helping each component operate with greater stability and consistency.
notes: Engineered foundations for complete Kronos analogue systems.
Designed to reduce environmental vibration and preserve mechanical stability.

endorsements.quote: A complete analogue system depends on the stability of every mechanical interface, from floor to component.
